ats_utilities.splasher.github_infrastructure module¶

Module

github_infrastructure.py

Info

Defines class GitHubInfrastructure with attribute(s) and method(s). Creates an API for processing hyperlinks for splash screen.

class ats_utilities.splasher.github_infrastructure.GitHubInfrastructure(context_bundle: ContextBundle | None = None)[source]¶

Bases: IExtInfrastructure

Defines class GitHubInfrastructure with attribute(s) and method(s). Creates an API for processing hyperlinks for splash screen.

It defines:

attributes:
_required_keys - Required keys for infrastructure property (default frozenset).
_checker - Injected parameters checker (default Checker).
_reporter - Injected reporter for messaging (default Reporter).
_verbose - Injected Enable/Disable verbose option (default False).
_infrastructure_property - Splasher GitHub hyperlinks property (default None).
methods:
__init__ - Initials GitHubInfrastructure constructor.
get_info_text - Pre-processes info text.
get_issue_text - Pre-processes issue text.
get_author_text - Pre-processes author text.
__str__ - Returns the string representation of GitHubInfrastructure.
_abc_impl = <_abc._abc_data object>¶
_checker: IChecker¶
_reporter: IReporter¶
_required_keys: frozenset[str] = frozenset({'ats_organization', 'ats_repository'})¶
_verbose: bool¶
get_author_text() → str[source]¶

Pre-processes author text for splash.

Returns:

Hyperlink with author info.

Return type:

<str>

Exceptions:

ATSValueError, ATSRuntimeError, ATSAttributeError.

get_info_text() → str[source]¶

Pre-processes info text for splash.

Returns:

Hyperlink with info text.

Return type:

<str>

Exceptions:

ATSValueError, ATSRuntimeError, ATSAttributeError.

get_issue_text() → str[source]¶

Pre-processes issue text for splash.

Returns:

Hyperlink with issue info.

Return type:

<str>

Exceptions:

ATSValueError, ATSRuntimeError, ATSAttributeError.

property infrastructure_property: dict[Any, Any] | None¶

Property method for getting infrastructure property.

Returns:

Formatted infrastructure property in dict format | None.

Return type:

<dict[Any, Any] | None>

Exceptions:

ATSRuntimeError, ATSAttributeError.
